use_cases: Display placeholder content while data is being fetched to improve perceived loading performance
Provide visual feedback during page transitions or route changes
Show skeleton states for cards, lists, or text content loading
ai_summary: A lightweight atomic skeleton loader component that displays a pulsing placeholder with muted background styling. Used to improve user experience by showing content structure during asynchronous data loading, common in dashboard, feed, and list views across SaaS, e-commerce, and media applications.
